Institutional Agent.bottom_line: Institutional signal is directional and should be confirmed with holder details.
Institutional Agent.what_it_means: The Institutional Agent checks SEC/FMP ownership context and whether large funds may be accumulating or reducing exposure.
Institutional Agent.why_it_matters: Institutional buying can support demand, but 13F data is delayed and not real time.
Institutional Agent.investor_action: Use institutional data as confirmation, not as the primary reason to buy. Look for net fund accumulation over multiple quarters.
Institutional Agent.green_flag: Major holders increasing positions or more funds adding than reducing.
Institutional Agent.red_flag: Broad institutional reduction or falling ownership across several quarters.

Competitor Agent.data_used: FMP peer list and company fundamentals
Competitor Agent.summary: Compares company fundamentals and valuation context against peers.
risks: Peer list unavailable in current scan.
Competitor Agent.what_it_means: The Competitor Agent compares growth, valuation, margin, and peer context where peer data is available.
Competitor Agent.why_it_matters: A stock is more attractive when it grows faster or has better margins while trading at a reasonable valuation versus peers.
Competitor Agent.investor_action: If peer data is unavailable, do not over-weight this agent. When available, prefer stocks with stronger growth and cheaper valuation than peers.
Competitor Agent.green_flag: Growth above peer average with equal or lower valuation.
Competitor Agent.red_flag: Expensive valuation while growth or margins lag competitors.

Recovery Agent.data_used: 52-week drawdown, growth, analyst support, technical recovery signals
Recovery Agent.summary: Explains whether this is a recovery candidate or momentum setup.
risks: Recovery thesis requires business outlook to remain intact.
Recovery Agent.bottom_line: Recovery setup exists only if fundamentals remain healthy.
Recovery Agent.what_it_means: The Recovery Agent evaluates whether a stock has dropped enough to create a recovery opportunity while fundamentals remain intact.
Recovery Agent.why_it_matters: A stock that is down sharply is not automatically cheap; the reason for the drop matters.
Recovery Agent.investor_action: Prefer recovery setups where the drop appears temporary, revenue/EPS outlook remains stable, and analyst/news support improves.
Recovery Agent.green_flag: Large drawdown with improving fundamentals or stabilizing guidance.
Recovery Agent.red_flag: Drop caused by broken business model, worsening guidance, debt stress, or repeated misses.

ETF / Ownership Agent.data_used: ETF inclusion and ownership flow framework
risks: Detailed ETF flow data not fully connected yet.
ETF / Ownership Agent.bottom_line: ETF/ownership is not yet a primary scoring driver.
ETF / Ownership Agent.what_it_means: The ETF / Ownership Agent checks whether index or ETF exposure may support demand for the stock.
ETF / Ownership Agent.why_it_matters: Stocks included in major ETFs can benefit from passive inflows, but this is usually a secondary signal.
ETF / Ownership Agent.investor_action: Use ETF ownership as a supporting confirmation only.
ETF / Ownership Agent.green_flag: Included in major growth/technology ETFs with strong inflows.
ETF / Ownership Agent.red_flag: Low ownership support or removal from key indexes/ETFs.
